message:
🐛 Show service health indicator for unconfigured providers (#315)

Separate configuration status from service health in the Provider
Health card. Unconfigured AI providers now check actual service
health via Statuspage.io API and display a health dot (green/yellow/
red) alongside a "No Key" badge, instead of just showing a gray
"Not Configured" status.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
